steps.title: Find the shared observation
steps.content: Text 1 says tropical mountain birds are limited in the spaces they can inhabit because they survive at specific elevations. Text 2 says these birds tend to inhabit smaller geographic areas when many other bird species are present.

steps.title: Ignore disputed causes
steps.content: The texts differ on whether temperature or competition explains the restriction, but both agree that tropical mountain bird species are restricted in where they live. B, C, and D introduce tools, nests, or genetics, which neither text discusses. The answer is A.
